source: Claremont CCDL title search (Codex VI pages 13-21)

records.title: Codex VI, papyrus page 13
records.description: Image contains label in bottom right corner, "Codex VI, 10549, 13." Mylar is labeled, "VI, 13, [1]3" with arrow pointing right, and "A VI, 13."

records.title: Codex VI, papyrus page 14
records.description: Image contains blank label in bottom left corner. Mylar is labeled, "VI, [14], [1]4" with arrow pointing right, and "A VI, 14."

records.description: Image contains label in bottom right corner, "Codex VI, 10549, 15." Mylar is labeled, "VI, 15, [15]" with arrow pointing right, and "A VI, 15."

records.description: Image contains blank label in bottom left corner. Mylar is labeled, "VI, [16], [1]6" with arrow pointing right, and "A VI, 16."

records.title: Codex VI, papyrus page 17
records.description: Negative number 109. Envelope reads, "M VI, 17." The photo is labeled, "M 8/74" and "VI, 17," with an arrow pointing up. A scale appears on the right-hand side.

records.title: Codex VI, papyrus page 18
records.description: Negative number 110. Envelope reads, "M VI, 18." The photo is labeled, "M 8/74" and "VI, 18," with an arrow pointing right. A scale appears at the bottom of the photograph.
